topic: Developer activity for DeFi & chains over time
summary: Authoritative time-series of crypto/Web3 developer activity, primarily from the Electric Capital Developer Report (the industry-standard open-source dev tracker, analyzing 900M+ commits across 1.7M+ repos). Total monthly active open-source crypto developers grew from ~1,000 in 2015 to a peak of ~26,000-30,000 in 2021-2022 (all-time-high monthly count around the late-2021/mid-2022 market top; ~61,000+ NEW developers joined in calendar 2022, the most ever), then contracted with the bear market to 23,343 (Dec 2022), 22,411 (2023, -25% YoY by some cuts / -24% by others), and 23,613 (2024, ~-7%). A notable structural shift: while overall headcount fell, EXPERIENCED developers (2+ years) grew (+27% in 2024) and now write ~70% of all code. By ecosystem, Ethereum (incl. L2s) remains #1 in total developers and code written (~6,200 monthly active L1+L2 in 2024; reported 31,869 total active in 2025 on a broader basis), but in 2024 Solana surpassed Ethereum as the #1 ecosystem for NEW developers for the first time since 2016 (7,625 new, +83% YoY). DeFi-specific monthly active developers peaked around 3,900 (2022) after exploding from ~600 (Oct 2020) and ~2,500 (2021); ~3,532 in 2024. Note: Electric Capital's counting methodology and headline definitions shifted across reports (monthly-active vs. total-active vs. new), so cross-year comparisons carry moderate uncertainty; figures are end-of-year/peak snapshots as labeled.

series.label: Total monthly active open-source crypto developers (Electric Capital)

points.note: ~1,000 monthly active devs at Ethereum's launch; baseline cited repeatedly by Electric Capital. Low precision (approx).
4,000+ developers per month contributing code (Electric Capital 2018 report).
Close to 9,000 monthly active developers across all ecosystems as of the Dec 2020 report; new monthly devs grew +15% in 2020. Approx.
18,000+ monthly active developers; 34,000+ NEW devs joined in 2021 (highest in history at the time). Electric Capital 2021 report.
23,343 monthly active in December 2022; this was after the peak. Calendar-2022 saw 61,000+ NEW devs (all-time-high new-dev inflow). +5% YoY overall despite 70%+ price decline.
22,411 monthly active open-source developers (Electric Capital 2023 report). Headline reported as -24% to -25% YoY depending on cut; newcomers (<12mo) fell -53%.
23,613 (some sources 23,615) monthly active in Nov 2024; ~-7% YoY. Experienced devs (2+yr) +27% and wrote 70% of code. 39,148 new devs in 2024.
~25,000 by mid-2025 per secondary reporting of Electric Capital data; full-year 2025 report not yet confirmed published as of mid-2026. LOWER CONFIDENCE / rounded.

series.label: Peak / all-time-high crypto developer metrics (Electric Capital)

points.note: All-time-high MONTHLY-ACTIVE developer count occurred mid-June 2022 (Dec 2022 figure of 23,343 was '-11% from peak', implying peak ~26,000). Peak monthly-active value approximate, derived from -11% off-peak statement.
All-time-high NEW developers in a single calendar year: 61,000+ devs contributed code for the first time during 2022.
606 DeFi developers total as of Oct 31, 2020 (220 infrequent contributors, 107 frequent/full-time-equivalent contributors). +67% in monthly active DeFi devs since Jan 2020.
2,500+ developers working on DeFi projects; DeFi devs +76% in 2021; 500+ new DeFi devs every month except January 2021.
3,901 monthly active DeFi developers (+240% since 'DeFi summer'); ~50% of DeFi devs outside Ethereum. Peak DeFi figure.
3,532 monthly active DeFi developers (Electric Capital 2024 report).
1,084 monthly active Ethereum developers (per 2022 report's historical comparison).
4,000+ monthly active Ethereum developers, largest ecosystem; +42% growth in 2021.
5,819 monthly active Ethereum developers (5x vs 2018); largest single ecosystem.
6,244 monthly active Ethereum (L1) developers, down ~17% YoY. ~56% of Ethereum devs work on L2s; Ethereum L1+L2 ~65% of all new code written.
372 monthly active Bitcoin developers (per 2022 report's historical comparison).
680+ monthly active Bitcoin developers; +10% growth in 2021.
946 monthly active Bitcoin developers (3x vs 2018).
~1,200 monthly active Bitcoin developers, roughly stable YoY.

series.label: New developers per ecosystem in 2024 (Electric Capital 2024 report)

points.note: Solana attracted 7,625 new developers in 2024 (+83% YoY) - #1 ecosystem for NEW devs for first time since 2016.
39,148 total new developers entered crypto in 2024 (down from 45,580 in 2023). India = 17% of new devs, surpassing the US.

series.label: New developers per ecosystem Jan-Sep 2025 (Electric Capital data, via Ethereum Foundation)

points.note: Ethereum (incl. L2s) added 16,181 new developers Jan-Sep 2025 - #1 for new devs in 2025.
Solana added ~11,500 new developers Jan-Sep 2025 (#2).
Bitcoin added 7,494 new developers Jan-Sep 2025 (#3).

series.label: Total active developers per ecosystem 2025 (Electric Capital data, via Ethereum Foundation; broader 'active' basis)

points.note: 31,869 total active Ethereum developers (incl. L2s, no cross-layer double-count). Broader 'active' definition than monthly-active series above. ETH full-time devs +5.8% YoY.
17,708 total active Solana developers; Solana FT devs +29.1% YoY, +61.7% over 2yrs. Solana Foundation says figure may undercount by ~7,800.
11,036 total active Bitcoin contributors.

key_facts.claim: Crypto developer ecosystem grew at ~39% average annual rate since Ethereum's 2015 launch (from ~1,000 to ~23,600 monthly active by 2024)

key_facts.as_of: Nov 2024 latest report; ~25,000 mid-2025 per secondary reporting

key_facts.claim: All-time-high MONTHLY-ACTIVE developer count occurred mid-June 2022 (~26,000, derived from Dec 2022 being -11% off peak)
All-time-high NEW developers in a single year: 61,000+ first-time contributors in calendar 2022
Solana surpassed Ethereum as #1 ecosystem for NEW developers in 2024 (first time since 2016): 7,625 new Solana devs, +83% YoY
Ethereum remains #1 for total developer activity and code written; ~65% of new code is across Ethereum L1+L2; 56% of Ethereum devs work on L2s; Base = 42% of new code in the Ethereum ecosystem
key_facts.value: Ethereum ~65% of new code; 56% on L2

key_facts.claim: DeFi-specific monthly active developers peaked at 3,901 (2022); ~3,532 (2024); grew from 606 total (Oct 2020) and 2,500+ (2021)
Structural shift: overall headcount down post-2022 but experienced devs (2+ years) grew +27% in 2024 and write ~70% of all code

In 2025 (Jan-Sep), Ethereum led new-dev growth (16,181) ahead of Solana (~11,500) and Bitcoin (7,494); total active devs reported as Ethereum 31,869, Solana 17,708, Bitcoin 11,036 on a broader 'active' basis
key_facts.source_name: Yahoo Finance / Electric Capital via Ethereum Foundation

key_facts.claim: 1 in 3 crypto developers (34%) work on multiple chains in 2024, up from <10% in 2015; ~74% of multichain devs work on an EVM chain

Methodology note: Electric Capital's 2024 analysis covered 902M code commits across 1.7M open-source repositories (vs 89M commits / 276K repos in 2020), so coverage expansion partly affects cross-year totals

top_entities.name: Ethereum (incl. L2s)
top_entities.metric: Total active developers 2025 / #1 ecosystem by total dev activity & code
top_entities.value: 31,869 total active (2025); ~6,244 monthly active L1 (2024); ~65% of new crypto code

top_entities.name: Solana
top_entities.metric: #1 for NEW developers in 2024; #2 total active 2025
top_entities.value: 7,625 new devs in 2024 (+83% YoY); 17,708 total active (2025); FT devs +29.1% YoY

top_entities.name: Base (Coinbase L2)
top_entities.metric: Share of new code in Ethereum ecosystem
top_entities.value: 42% of new code written in the Ethereum ecosystem (2024)

top_entities.name: India (geography)
top_entities.value: 17% of all new devs in 2024 - surpassed the US as #1 source of new developers
